description: State document, Fatimid, in large chancery script. Mentions the chief Fatimid judge and dāʿī Qāsim b. ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz b. al-Nuʿmān, and that his name is registered in the dīwān al-nafaqāt. Recycled for a large bifolio of Judaeo-Arabic accounts.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
